California WIC Formula
California WIC Formula
En Español
California WIC Formula
S
tarting on August 1, 2025,
California WIC will provide
Enfamil milk-based
and
Similac soy-based
infant formulas.
Most babies transition easily from one brand of formula to another without any problems. All major brand-name formulas contain similar ingredients and will meet your baby's nutritional needs.
WIC also provides breastfeeding support and infant feeding guidance to all families.
WIC contract formulas:
Enfamil Infant (12.5 oz powder or 13 fl. oz liquid concentrate) This is recommended as the first choice for milk-based formula
Enfamil Gentlease (12.4 oz powder only)
Enfamil Reguline (12.4 oz powder only)
Enfamil A.R. (12.9 oz powder)
Similac Soy Isomil (12.4 oz powder or 13 fl oz liquid concentrate)
Infant Formula Flyer:

WIC Medical Formula and Nutritionals Request
Pediatric Referral Form
You should use the California
WIC App
to check your WIC food benefits and to make sure you are getting the right formula.
WIC also provides breastfeeding and infant feeding support to all families. Call your
WIC office
or text (888) 417-6180
for more information on breastfeeding support, what formulas are available, infant feeding tips and answers to your formula questions
